hero.title:
A colonial house.
An unforgettable experience.
hero.subtitle: 12 unique rooms in an 18th-century colonial house steps from the walled city

intro.title: Experience Cartagena from within
intro.p1: In the heart of the San Diego neighborhood, inside the walled city, there is a house that has kept silence for more than two centuries. Its coral stone walls, carved wooden ceilings and central courtyard with centuries-old palms are a living testament to an era that time has not been able to erase.
intro.p2: The Aristizábal family acquired this manor in 1987 and spent more than a decade restoring it stone by stone, preserving every original detail: the Italian marble floors, the wooden windows with baroque facades and the colonial well that still decorates the center of the courtyard.
intro.p3: Today, Casa Boutique San Diego opens its doors to offer something the large hotels cannot: the intimacy of a family home with the discreet luxury of those who know the true art of hospitality.

patio.name: Patio Room
patio.tagline: Where the garden comes through the window
patio.desc: 30 m² of colonial elegance with direct views of the inner courtyard. The garden breeze and whispering palms are your best alarm clock.

balcon.name: Balcony Room
balcon.tagline: The colonial street as a living painting
balcon.desc: 40 m² with a private balcony overlooking the cobblestone street. Every morning, Cartagena wakes up before you with its colors and Caribbean light.

mirador.name: Mirador Suite
mirador.tagline: The walled city at your feet
mirador.desc: 65 m² suite with private terrace and jacuzzi. The panoramic view of the city wall at sunset is priceless. Personal butler included.

services.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't

restaurant.title: Signature restaurant
restaurant.desc: Contemporary Caribbean cuisine featuring the finest local produce from Colombia's Caribbean coast

pool.title: Indoor pool
pool.desc: Heated pool in the colonial courtyard, surrounded by tropical vegetation

spa.title: Spa & wellness
spa.desc: Treatments with local ingredients: coconut oil, passion fruit flowers, Guajira clay

terrace.title: Rooftop bar
terrace.desc: Privileged views of the city walls and colonial rooftops. The best sunset in Cartagena

concierge.title: 24/7 Concierge
concierge.desc: Your personal guide to discover the Cartagena that guidebooks don't show

transfers.title: Private transfers
transfers.desc: Luxury vehicles to and from Rafael Núñez Airport

events.title: Private events
events.desc: Weddings, anniversaries and exclusive celebrations in our unique spaces

tours.title: Curated tours
tours.desc: Experiences designed by local experts to discover the authentic side of Cartagena

footer.tagline: A colonial house. An unforgettable experience.
